examples: If that's not mindboggling enough, a "googolplex" is a number with a googol number of zeros.
And the generation of big prime number and the googol computation are also solved in this system.
Just five years ago a googol was an obscure, unimaginable concept: the number one followed by 100 zeros.
They adopted the name Google in early 1997, in a tribute to scale, a play on the number known as a googol--a one followed by a hundred zeros.
The denizens of the company headquarters breezily refer to it as the Googleplex, that being the word for the unimaginably large number defined as a one followed by a googol of zeros.
